 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","title":"Implement end-to-end test suite (e2e/)","description":"**Details:**
- Full user flow tests using Playwright
- Test critical paths: search → view → copy → install
- Test cross-browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- Test mobile viewports
- Test offline mode (PWA)

**Critical E2E Flows:**
1. **Search & Copy Flow:**
   - Load homepage
   - Type in search bar
   - Click prompt card
   - Click copy button
   - Verify clipboard content

2. **Basket & Export Flow:**
   - Add multiple prompts to basket
   - Open basket sidebar
   - Export as ZIP
   - Verify ZIP contents

3. **SpotlightSearch Flow:**
   - Press Cmd+K
   - Type query
   - Navigate with arrow keys
   - Press Enter to copy

4. **Skill Install Flow:**
   - Click install button
   - Verify command copied to clipboard

5. **Mobile Flows:**
   - Test touch interactions
   - Bottom sheet prompt detail
   - Swipe gestures

**Logging Requirements:**
- Detailed step-by-step logs
- Screenshot on failure
- Network request logging
- Console error capture

**Framework:** Playwright

**Test Organization:**
```
e2e/
  tests/
    search-copy.spec.ts
    basket-export.spec.ts
    spotlight.spec.ts
    mobile.spec.ts
    pwa-offline.spec.ts
  fixtures/
    ...
  playwright.config.ts
```

**Reasoning:** E2E tests validate entire user journeys work correctly. Critical for catching integration issues between frontend components.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:32.191748492-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T17:18:38.057356238-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T17:18:38.057356238-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented Playwright e2e test suite with 19 tests covering spotlight search, search-copy flow, homepage cards, and filter functionality. All tests passing on chromium.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.628822653-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-7g3","title":"Implement jfp help command (full documentation)","description":"**Details:**
- `jfp help` shows comprehensive documentation
- Organized by category: Listing, Viewing, Copying, Installing, Registry, etc.
- Examples for common workflows
- Links to online documentation
- Pager support for long output

**Output Structure:**
```
USAGE
  jfp <command> [options]

COMMANDS

  Listing & Searching
    list                    List all prompts
    search <query>          Search prompts by query
    suggest <task>          Suggest prompts for a task

  Viewing
    show <id>               Show prompt details
    categories              List all categories
    tags                    List all tags with counts

  Copying & Exporting
    copy <id>               Copy prompt to clipboard
    render <id>             Render prompt with variables
    export <id>             Export as SKILL.md or markdown

  Installing Skills
    install <id>...         Install prompts as skills
    uninstall <id>...       Remove installed skills
    installed               List installed skills
    update                  Update installed skills

  Bundles
    bundles                 List available bundles
    bundle show <id>        Show bundle details

  Registry
    registry status         Show cache status
    registry refresh        Force cache refresh

  Utilities
    open <id>               Open prompt in browser
    doctor                  Check environment
    about                   About this tool
    completion              Generate shell completions

EXAMPLES
  jfp list --category ideation --json
  jfp search 'readme' --limit 5
  jfp install idea-wizard readme-reviser
  jfp render my-prompt --VAR=value

DOCUMENTATION
  https://jeffreysprompts.com/docs
```

**Reasoning:** Comprehensive help is essential for CLI discoverability. Agents and humans both benefit from well-organized documentation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:34:02.703131871-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:41:23.609032273-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:41:23.609032273-05:00","close_reason":"Help command already fully implemented with: organized categories, examples, documentation links, pager support, and JSON output for agents.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-7g3","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-xdt","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:43.460016979-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ms6","title":"Configure Cloudflare DNS for jeffreysprompts.com","description":"**Details:**
- Set up DNS records in Cloudflare
- Point domain to Vercel
- Configure SSL/TLS
- Enable caching and security features

**DNS Records:**
```
Type  Name    Content                   Proxy
CNAME @       cname.vercel-dns.com      Yes
CNAME www     cname.vercel-dns.com      Yes
```

**SSL/TLS Settings:**
- Mode: Full (strict)
- Always Use HTTPS: On
- Automatic HTTPS Rewrites: On
- HSTS: Enabled with long max-age

**Caching:**
- Browser Cache TTL: 4 hours
- Respect Existing Headers: Yes

**Security:**
- Bot Fight Mode: On
- Security Level: Medium

**Verification:**
- Add Vercel domain verification TXT record if required
- Test SSL certificate issuance

**Reasoning:** Cloudflare provides CDN, SSL, and DDoS protection. Proper DNS setup ensures reliable, secure access to jeffreysprompts.com.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:33:27.131701883-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T17:14:41.769783804-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T17:14:41.769783804-05:00","close_reason":"Site is live at jeffreysprompts.com - DNS configured with Cloudflare pointing to Vercel. SSL/TLS, caching, and security features active.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ms6","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-6xs","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:20.797846225-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-n3p","title":"Create build-data.ts script for data pipeline","description":"**Details:**
- Main build script that generates all static data files
- Validates prompts against schema
- Generates registry.json and registry.manifest.json
- Computes checksums for cache validation
- Reports errors with clear messages

**Script Responsibilities:**
1. Import prompts from packages/core
2. Validate all prompts against Zod schema
3. Generate registry.json with full payload
4. Generate registry.manifest.json with checksums
5. Write files to apps/web/public/
6. Output summary statistics

**Implementation:**
```typescript
// scripts/build-data.ts
import { prompts, bundles, workflows } from '@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts';
import { promptSchema } from '@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts/schema';
import { createHash } from 'crypto';

async function main() {
  console.log('Building data assets...');
  
  // Validate prompts
  const errors: string[] = [];
  for (const prompt of prompts) {
    const result = promptSchema.safeParse(prompt);
    if (!result.success) {
      errors.push(`${prompt.id}: ${result.error.message}`);
    }
  }
  
  if (errors.length) {
    console.error('Validation errors:', errors);
    process.exit(1);
  }
  
  // Build registry payload
  const registry = {
    schemaVersion: 1,
    version: process.env.JFP_REGISTRY_VERSION ?? '0.0.0',
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    prompts,
    bundles,
    workflows,
    meta: {
      totalPromptCount: prompts.length,
      categories: [...new Set(prompts.map(p => p.category))],
      tags: [...new Set(prompts.flatMap(p => p.tags))].sort()
    }
  };
  
  // Compute checksums
  const registryJson = JSON.stringify(registry);
  const registryHash = createHash('sha256').update(registryJson).digest('hex');
  
  const manifest = {
    version: registry.version,
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    checksums: {
      registry: `sha256:${registryHash}`,
      prompts: Object.fromEntries(
        prompts.map(p => [p.id, `sha256:${createHash('sha256').update(p.content).digest('hex')}`])
      )
    }
  };
  
  // Write files
  await Bun.write('apps/web/public/registry.json', registryJson);
  await Bun.write('apps/web/public/registry.manifest.json', JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2));
  
  console.log(`✓ Generated registry.json (${prompts.length} prompts)`);
  console.log(`✓ Generated registry.manifest.json`);
}

main();
```

**Run in CI:**
- Part of build step before Next.js build
- Fails CI if validation errors

**Location:** scripts/build-data.ts

**Reasoning:** Centralized data pipeline ensures registry consistency. Checksum manifest enables efficient cache validation by CLI and PWA.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:35:24.147772264-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T01:28:41.560408998-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T01:28:41.560408998-05:00","close_reason":"Build scripts created: build-cli.sh, build-releases.sh, build-data.ts for registry generation","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-n3p","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-oc2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:37:57.240400934-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
